landing.title: Prove Your Talent. Earn Your AURA.
landing.subtitle: The verified talent platform for skilled professionals. Complete your assessment, earn your AURA badge, and get discovered by top organizations.
landing.heroTitle: The new standard of professional verification
landing.heroSubtitle: Earn your AURA score, prove your skills, and get discovered by top organizations.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stand out
landing.featuresSubtitle: Volaura is not just another platform. It is proof.
landing.feature1Desc: 8 competencies. One verified score. Your true talent profile, built through real assessment.
landing.feature2Desc: Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze — earned through performance, not just participation.
landing.feature3Desc: Colleagues verify your skills in 30 seconds. One link. Permanent proof on your profile.
landing.feature4Desc: Your personal AI coach shows exactly which skills to improve and the fastest path forward.
landing.feature5Desc: Organizations search and find you by verified competencies. No applications needed.
landing.feature6Desc: Every event adds to your profile. Real experience, real data, real credibility.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: From zero to recognized talent in 3 steps
landing.step1Desc: Complete our adaptive assessment. 8 competencies measured, AI-evaluated, 30 minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Your AURA score determines your tier — Bronze to Platinum. Share on LinkedIn or Telegram.
landing.step3Desc: Organizations see your verified profile and reach out. You get chosen, not the other way around.
landing.orgSubtitle: Stop reading CVs. Search verified talent by skill, score, and availability.
landing.footerTagline: Built for professionals who want proof, not promises.

auth.signupSubtitle: Join the platform for verified talent
auth.accountTypeVolunteerDesc: I want to prove my skills
auth.inviteCodeHint: Volaura is currently invite-only. Ask a friend or contact us to get a code.
auth.inviteCodeInvalid: Invalid invite code. Please try again.
auth.privacyConsent: 🔒 My data is protected — Volaura never sells to third parties
auth.privacyConsentRequired: Please accept the privacy policy to continue.
auth.passwordHint: 8+ characters, uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.checkEmailDesc: We sent a reset link to {{email}}. It expires in 1 hour.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password updated successfully. Please log in with your new password.
auth.foundingMemberMessage: You're a Founding Member. Your number is reserved forever.
auth.oauthInviteRequired: Social sign-up is unavailable during invite-only beta. Use email + invite code.

assessment.title: Competency Assessment
assessment.guidance: New here? Start with 1-2 competencies. You can always come back for more.
assessment.canSave: You can save and resume anytime — no pressure to finish in one go
assessment.question: Question
assessment.leaveWarning: If you leave, your progress will be lost. Continue?
assessment.timerExpired: Time's up — moving to next question
assessment.takingBreak: Progress saved. You can return any time.
assessment.stillWorking: Still working — AI is reviewing your answer...
assessment.refreshedMidSession: It looks like you refreshed mid-assessment. Your progress is saved.
assessment.errorStartFailed: Couldn't start assessment. Server is busy. Please try again in a moment.
assessment.cooldownError: You recently completed an assessment. You can try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
assessment.errorSubmitFailed: Answer not saved. Check your connection and tap Submit again.
assessment.errorLoadingQuestion: Couldn't load next question. Your progress is saved — tap Try Again.
assessment.sessionExpired: Your session has ended. Log in again to continue your progress.
assessment.tipImprove: Practice more in this area and retake to improve your score.
assessment.tipGood: Great score! Try other competencies to build your full AURA profile.
assessment.tipExcellent: Outstanding! Organizations can now find you in search.
assessment.gamingWarning: Some responses were flagged for unusual patterns. Your score may be adjusted.
assessment.scoringAdjustedDesc: We detected some patterns in your responses. Your score was adjusted accordingly.

gamingFlag.excessiveRushing: Some answers were submitted too quickly
gamingFlag.excessiveSlowness: Some answers had very long pauses

assessment.coachingSubtitle: Based on your score, here's how to improve:
assessment.sessionNotFound: Session not found or not yet complete.
assessment.infoNoDescription: Test your skills and get a verified score for this competency.
assessment.milestoneDiscoverable: You're now discoverable to organizations on Volaura.
assessment.shareNudge: You're in the top tier — let organizations find you.
assessment.shareNudgeSilver: Building momentum — share your progress and challenge a peer.
assessment.shareNudgeLow: Share your progress — every score tells a story.
assessment.shareBodyLow: {{competency}} result: {{score}}{{percentile}} on Volaura — improving my AURA 📈
assessment.auraSyncPending: Your AURA score is being recalculated — check back in a few minutes.
assessment.scoreUnlocksDiscovery: Your AURA is now live — organizations can search and find you.
assessment.scoreUnlocksMore: Complete 2+ competencies to unlock discovery by organizations.

aura.title: Your AURA Score
aura.noScoreDescription: Complete at least one assessment to earn your score.
aura.setUsernameToShare: Set a username in Settings to unlock sharing.
aura.shareText: I just got my AURA score on Volaura — {{score}} points with a {{badge}} badge! Check yours:
aura.noExplanations: Complete an assessment to see your score breakdown
aura.scoreMeaning_top5: Trusted by top organizations — Master level
aura.hiddenStrengthDesc: This competency is among the highest-rated on the Volaura platform.
aura.sharePromptBody: Share it so organizations can find you.
aura.assessmentInProgressDesc: Your AURA score is being calculated. Complete all competencies to see your final score.
aura.cooldownNotifBody: Your {{competency}} retake is ready — come back to improve your AURA score.
aura.nextStepAssessDesc: Each competency adds to your AURA score
aura.nextStepLeaderboardDesc: View your position on the platform

onboarding.title: Complete your profile

step3.title: Your first skill
step3.subtitle: Pick the skill you want to verify first

onboarding.whyDesc: One assessment earns your AURA badge. Organizations actively search for verified professionals like you.
onboarding.step1Desc: You're one of the first on Volaura. Let's show the world your real skills in 3 minutes.
onboarding.benefit1: Verified competency score — not just a CV
onboarding.benefit2: Earn a Bronze to Platinum badge
onboarding.benefit3: Get discovered by top event organizers
onboarding.step2Desc: Start with what you're most confident in. You can add more later.
onboarding.step3Desc: Your first assessment: {{competency}}. ~5 minutes. No right or wrong — just show who you are.
onboarding.next2: AI evaluates your responses in real time
onboarding.next3: Get your AURA score and badge
onboarding.visibleToOrgs: Let organizations find me in search (my data stays protected)
onboarding.visibleToOrgsInfo: Your profile will be visible to verified organizations — you can control this in Settings.

welcome.title: You're in, {{name}}! 🎉
welcome.subtitle: You're about to earn something real.
welcome.benefit1: 8 competencies — verified through real adaptive questions
welcome.benefit2: Bronze → Platinum badge shared on LinkedIn and Telegram
welcome.benefit3: Organizations search our talent pool — you get discovered

dashboard.noScore: Complete your first assessment to get your AURA score

feed.title: Recommended for you
feed.empty: Complete an assessment — your feed reflects your actual skills, not guesses

dashboard.activityEmptyHint: Be one of the first to complete an assessment. Your activity becomes part of what every future member sees.
dashboard.noScoreHeadline: You're one of the first. That means something.
dashboard.noScoreSub: No one is ahead of you yet. Complete your assessment and claim your founding rank.
dashboard.orgZeroHeadline: Verified talent is waiting for you
dashboard.orgZeroSub: Professionals are assessed on real skills. Browse opted-in profiles.

sharePrompt.title: Your AURA profile is live!

events.title: Events
events.noEventsSubtitle: New events are added regularly. Follow us on Telegram to get notified first.

events.errorLoadSubtitle: Check your connection and try again.

events.minAuraHint: Set 0 to allow all participants regardless of score.
events.makePublicHint: Public events are listed in the events directory.

settings.visibility: Who can see your AURA score?
settings.visibilityBadgeOnly: Badge Only — Shows tier, not score

verify.commentPlaceholder: Share a specific example or observation...

verify.errorUsedBody: This verification has already been submitted. Thank you for your time!
